scenario.system: You are an API. Always respond by calling classify_ticket with the complete classification. Never respond in plain text.
scenario.prompt: Classify this support ticket: 'My laptop screen is completely black since the update yesterday. I'm on a MacBook Pro M2, running Sonoma 14.3. I tried restarting 5 times. This is urgent - I have a presentation in 3 hours.'
scenario.rubric: Emits classify_ticket with category=hardware_issue (or display/hardware), severity=urgent/high, product=laptop, platform=macOS, reproducible=true or false (needs_reproduction ok), action_needed=immediate_response, and includes at least 2 tags from an appropriate set (e.g., 'display', 'post-update', 'urgent'). All required schema fields present.

reasons: all required fields present, severity=urgent, tags=3
